title: libpod: fix workdir MkdirAll() all check
body:
First commit fixes the regression, second commit improves the logic where I noticed some issues




#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

comments.body:
It's a lot simpler code-wise, but I had to really think about whether it was correct.

Maybe a comment on the comparison of securejoin vs filepath.Join results as to why it works?

/approve
Code LGTM
Cockpit tests failed for commit 65fa6a6f4d7b2d3a6c6d4fe10bc11bd7afd9ee20. @martinpitt, @jelly, @mvollmer please check.
Oops, I see paul wants to repush with test changes
Added more comments on the symlink check and updated the test with PodmanExitCleanly
